tools.name: funnel_analysis
tools.description: Conversion funnel across an ordered list of events. Returns per-step users, conversion-from-start, and step-to-step loss. Set export_stalled_at_step/export_converted to persist the matching user cohorts as named segments for downstream tools.

args.conversion_window_days: max days allowed between first and last step (default 14)
args.breakdown_property: optional user property to break the funnel down by
args.export_stalled_at_step: optional 1-based step index; exports users who reached this step but not the next as segment '<segment_name>_stalled' (result field: stalled_segment_name)
args.export_converted: optional true; exports users who completed all steps as segment '<segment_name>_converted' (result field: converted_segment_name)
args.segment_name: base name for exported segments (required with either export flag)

tools.exports: named user segments when export flags are set; downstream tasks reference them via {"$ref": <task_id>, "field": "stalled_segment_name"} or "converted_segment_name"

tools.name: insight_query
tools.description: Metric over one or more events: unique users or event counts, optionally grouped by a user property or by week. The general-purpose 'how many / how often' tool.

args.group_by_property: optional user property to group by
args.by_week: optional true for a weekly time series

tools.name: segment_definition
tools.description: Create a named user segment from profile filters and/or event-behavior filters. Segments are referenced by name from discovery/profile tools.

args.name: segment name (snake_case)
args.event_filters: optional list of {event, op: at_least|at_most, count, timeframe_days}

tools.name: segment_event_discovery
tools.description: Which events over- or under-index in a segment vs the whole population (lift analysis). The 'what do these users do differently' tool.

args.segment: segment name, or {"$ref": <task_id>, "field": "stalled_segment_name"} (or segment_name / converted_segment_name) to use a segment exported by an upstream task

tools.name: profile_segment
tools.description: Profile a segment against the whole population: which user properties (plan, country, device, channel, company size) deviate meaningfully. The 'who are these users' tool.

tools.name: product_paths
tools.description: The real navigation paths users take between a start and end event, compressed and ranked by user count. Restrict noise with allowed_events, or pass {"$ref": <task_id>} to use the events discovered by an upstream segment_event_discovery task.

args.allowed_events: optional list of event names, or {"$ref": <task_id>, "field": "event_names"}

tools.name: journey_map
tools.description: Layered journey graph between two events: per-step nodes with user counts, conversion and loss rates along the dominant paths. Optionally scoped to a segment.

tools.name: funnel_breakdown
tools.description: Automated breakdown mining: runs the base funnel, then re-runs it broken down by every candidate user property, returning the property values with the largest positive lift (boosters) and negative lift (blockers) on conversion, ranked by impact = affected users x |lift|.
